## Checklist

- [ ] Created a folder under `tools/` with a `README.md`
- [ ] Filled in all required frontmatter fields (name, description, url, category, built_with, audience, author, author_slack, date_added)

- [ ] Category is one of: `Tools`, `Simulations`, `References`
